What is the only nation adjacent to Seoul's country by land?

What countries border Hungary (to the north-west)?
What countries border Czech Republic (to the east)?
What countries border Slovakia (to the south)?
What countries border Romania (to the east)?

What countries border Albania (to the north)?
What countries border Belarus (to the north)?

What countries border Lithuania (to the north)?

What countries border Turkmenistan (to the south)?
What countries border Mongolia (to the south)?
What countries border Bhutan (to the north)?
What countries border Nepal (to the north)?
What countries border Myanmar (to the west)?
What countries border Cambodia (to the west)?
What countries border Laos (to the south)?
What countries border Thailand (to the north-east)?
What countries border Malaysia (to the north)?
What countries border Brunei?
What countries border East Timor?

What West African country is nearly enclosed by Senegal on three sides?

What countries border Cameroon (to the east)?

What vast African nation, formerly Zaire, shares a capital-on-opposite-banks with Brazzaville?

What countries border Mali (to the north)?
What countries border Mauritania (to the south)?
What countries border Burkina Faso (to the north)?
What countries border Ivory Coast (to the west)?
What countries border Liberia (to the east)?
What countries border Sierra Leone (to the north)?

What West African neighbor of Senegal lies south of Bissau's border, sharing Conakry as its capital?
What countries border Benin (to the north)?
What countries border Togo (to the west)?
What countries border Djibouti (to the south)?

200.q: Argentine forward. 8x Ballon d'Or winner. Left-footed dribbler. Lifted the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.
Portuguese forward. 5x Ballon d'Or winner. Famous Siuuu celebration. Currently plays for Al-Nassr.
French forward. Won the World Cup at 19. Plays for Real Madrid. Explosive sprinting speed.
Brazilian forward. Spent time at Barcelona and PSG. Dazzling skill moves. Wears 10 for his country.
Norwegian striker. Shattered Premier League goal records. Son of a former Leeds defender. Plays for Manchester City.
Egyptian winger. Liverpool's Premier League era top scorer. Left-footed curler. Known as the Egyptian King.
Belgian playmaker. Manchester City midfielder. Pinpoint crosses and through balls. Famous red hair.
English striker. England's all-time top scorer. Former Tottenham captain now at Bayern Munich.
Croatian midfielder. 2018 Ballon d'Or winner. Six UCL titles at Real Madrid. Small-framed maestro.
Brazilian striker. Won the 2002 World Cup. Scored twice in that final. Known as R9.
Brazilian superstar. Three World Cups. Over 1,200 career goals. Crowned The King.
Argentine forward. Scored the Hand of God and Goal of the Century in 1986. Napoli icon.
French playmaker. Head-butted Materazzi in the 2006 final. Won three straight UCLs as Real Madrid coach.
English winger. Married a Spice Girl. Pinpoint crosses from deep. Wore 7 at Manchester United.
Swedish striker. Enormous ego and bicycle kicks. Played for Barca, Milan and Manchester United.
Dutch total-football icon. Won three European Cups with Ajax. Gave his name to a famous turn.
French striker. Scored twice in the 1998 World Cup final. Arsenal's all-time top scorer. Nicknamed Titi.
Welsh winger. Four Champions League trophies at Real Madrid. Scored a bicycle kick in the 2018 final.
Argentine striker. Manchester City legend. Scored the 93:20 Premier League winner vs QPR.
Senegalese forward. Premier League and UCL winner at Liverpool. Africa Cup of Nations champion.
Liverpool midfielder. 2005 Istanbul comeback captain. Slipped vs Chelsea in 2014.
Chelsea midfielder. Blues' all-time top scorer. Disallowed goal vs Germany in 2010.
Welsh winger. Manchester United legend. Most decorated English league player. Left-footed wizard.
Spanish keeper. Madrid number one for a decade. Lifted the 2010 World Cup as captain.
German goalkeeper. Lifted the 2014 World Cup. Sweeper-keeper pioneer. Longtime Bayern number one.
Portuguese midfielder. Manchester United captain. Set-piece specialist. Long-range shots and leadership.
Spanish striker. Real Madrid legend. Scored 323 goals for Los Blancos before Ronaldo passed him.
English striker. 1986 World Cup Golden Boot. Never booked in his career. Hosts Match of the Day.
French striker. Played with Messi at Barcelona. 2022 Ballon d'Or winner. Real Madrid legend.
Spanish midfielder. Heart of tiki-taka era. 2010 World Cup final goalscorer. Barcelona lifer.
Spanish midfielder. Barcelona's pass-master. 2010 World Cup winner. Elegant metronome.
Colombian striker. Bleach-blond afro. Monaco, Madrid and Inter. Scored a scorpion-kick goal in training.
Uruguayan striker. Biting incidents at multiple World Cups. Liverpool and Barcelona goal machine.
Polish striker. Bayern Munich goal monster. Scored five in nine minutes against Wolfsburg.
Gabonese striker. Arsenal captain who left for Barcelona. Known for Spiderman masks.
Ivorian striker. Chelsea's all-time top African scorer. 2012 Champions League winner. Scored the decisive penalty in that final.
English defender. Chelsea captain. Slipped taking the 2008 UCL final penalty. Record trophy haul at Stamford Bridge.
English defender. Manchester United and Leeds. Drug-test ban in 2003. TV pundit.
Irish midfielder. Manchester United captain. Fiery temperament. Feuded with Mick McCarthy in 2002.
English midfielder. Manchester United's red-headed passer. Famous long-range shots. Rarely gave interviews.
Brazilian forward. Buck-toothed wizard of the 2002 World Cup. Barcelona and Milan. R9's namesake.
French defender. 1998 World Cup and Euro 2000 winner. Chelsea and Real Madrid. Shaved head.
Brazilian right-back. Samba celebrations. Barcelona, PSG and Juventus. Record-breaking trophy haul.
Spanish defender. Real Madrid captain for years. Scored a famous last-gasp header in the 2014 UCL final against local rivals.
Brazilian midfielder. Manchester United metronome. Known as O Fenomeno at Old Trafford? No, known simply as the number 18.
Belgian forward. Real Madrid and Chelsea. Left-footed. Nicknamed Baby Zidane as a youngster.
Argentine forward. 2022 World Cup winner. Scored in UCL and Copa America finals. Nicknamed El Fideo.
French defender. 2018 World Cup winner. Former Madrid and Manchester United center-back. Shaved head.
Italian forward. Roma lifer. Nicknamed Il Gladiatore. Spent his entire career at his hometown club.
English midfielder. Tottenham and England captain in the 1990s. Scored six at Euro 96 warm-ups. Nicknamed The Guv'nor.
Dutch striker. Manchester United goal-scorer. Volley vs Spain at the 2014 World Cup. Nicknamed the Flying Dutchman.

400.q: Colombian playmaker. 2014 World Cup Golden Boot. Moved to Real Madrid that summer. Wears number 10.
Croatian striker. 2018 World Cup finalist. Juventus trophy winner. Classic volley against France in that final.
German midfielder. 2014 World Cup winner. Bayern Munich stalwart. Married tennis star Ana Ivanovic.
Spanish defender. Euro 2008 and 2010 World Cup winner. Barcelona captain. Long curly hair.
Dutch defender. Liverpool captain. Champions League winner in 2019. Ballon d'Or runner-up that year.
Dutch striker. Won Euro 1988. AC Milan legend. Retired early from ankle injuries.
German goal machine. Scored 68 for West Germany. Nicknamed Der Bomber. 1974 World Cup winner.
Liberian striker. 1995 Ballon d'Or winner. Later elected president of his country. Milan icon.
Ivorian midfielder. Barcelona La Liga winner before Manchester City. Powerhouse long-range shots.
Hungarian forward. Real Madrid star of the 1950s. Scored 84 international goals. The Galloping Major.
Argentine-Spanish forward. Real Madrid legend. Five straight European Cups. Nicknamed the Blond Arrow.
English striker. 2001 Ballon d'Or winner. Liverpool and Real Madrid. Rode racehorses after retiring.
English striker. Premier League all-time top scorer. Newcastle legend. Match of the Day pundit.
English defender. Manchester United right-back. Sky Sports pundit. Brother Phil also played for United.
Italian midfielder. AC Milan's combative enforcer. 2006 World Cup winner. Intimidating glare on the pitch.
Ukrainian striker. 2004 Ballon d'Or winner. Dynamo Kyiv and AC Milan. Missed decisive penalty in 2005 UCL final.
Dutch defender. Scored a famous free kick in the 1992 European Cup final. Later Barcelona and Netherlands coach.
Dutch goalkeeper. Manchester United and Ajax. Won Champions Leagues in 1995 and 2008. Towering reach.
Italian striker. 1982 World Cup Golden Boot and Golden Ball. Hat-trick vs Brazil that tournament.
Italian striker. Fiorentina and Roma legend. All-time Argentina top scorer before Messi. Nicknamed Batigol.
Argentine midfielder. Manchester United and Chelsea. Nicknamed La Brujita. Lazio Serie A winner.
Portuguese playmaker. Fiorentina and AC Milan. Portuguese Golden Generation. Number 10 elegance.
Spanish midfielder. Barcelona deep-lying pass master. 2010 World Cup winner. Now a club director.
Chilean midfielder. Arsenal, Barcelona and Inter. Nicknamed El Nino Maravilla. Copa America winner.
English forward. Tottenham captain before Kane. Scored header vs Arsenal in 2005. Not known for speed.
Welsh striker. Nicknamed the Red Dragon. Manchester United and Dynamo Kyiv. Scored at Euro 2016.
Swedish striker. Arsenal marksman. Sven-Goran Eriksson disciple. Ponytailed Scandinavian.
Romanian playmaker. Nicknamed the Maradona of the Carpathians. Real Madrid number 10 in the 90s.
Bulgarian striker. 1994 Ballon d'Or winner. Barcelona forward. Scored vs Germany at the 1994 World Cup.
Portuguese forward. Nicknamed O Rei. Benfica legend of the 1960s. European Cup winner in 1962.
Argentine midfielder. World Cup winning playmaker in 1986. Napoli teammate of Maradona. Sevilla and Lazio.
Brazilian midfielder. 1994 and 2002 World Cup winner. Yoga-loving keeper in his later years? No, holding midfielder.
Dutch midfielder. Barcelona's tall enforcer. Euro 1988 winner. Later Netherlands coach.
French defender. 2018 World Cup winner. Juventus, Madrid and Manchester United. Afro-haired center-back.
Belgian forward. Manchester United and Everton striker. Played alongside Hazard and De Bruyne for his country.
German defender. Bayern Munich captain. 2014 World Cup winner. Retired in 2022.
German defender. Bayern Munich captain after Hummels. 2014 World Cup winner. Red-card vs Argentina final.
Spanish striker. Liverpool forward under Benitez. Nicknamed El Nino. Scored at Anfield in a 4-1 win over Manchester United in 2009.
Chilean forward. Inter and Manchester City. Copa America winner. Dyed blond and shaggy hair.
Uruguayan forward. Atletico Madrid striker. 2010 World Cup top scorer. Nicknamed El Cacique.
Brazilian goalkeeper. Liverpool number one. 2019 UCL winner. Came from Roma.
Brazilian goalkeeper. Manchester City number one. 2019 Copa America winner. Short man on goal line.
English midfielder. Manchester City playmaker. Silky left foot. Scored in the 2023 UCL final.
English forward. Arsenal winger. 2022 Africa Cup of Nations goalscorer for Nigeria? No, plays for England.
German midfielder. Bayern Munich and Barcelona. 2014 World Cup winner. Short curly-haired playmaker.
Brazilian defender. Paris Saint-Germain and Chelsea captain. Multiple Ligue 1 titles. Elegant center-back.
German midfielder. 2014 World Cup winner. Real Madrid lifer. Retired in 2021.
German midfielder. Bayern Munich's ball-winner. 2014 World Cup winner. Short curly hair.
French midfielder. 2018 World Cup winner. Chelsea and Real Madrid. Combative N-prefixed name.
Spanish midfielder. Valencia CF legend. 2000 and 2001 UCL finalist. Briefly at Lazio and Middlesbrough.

600.q: Argentine midfielder. 1978 World Cup winner. Long Tottenham spell. Later managed Spurs.
Italian defender. Inter Milan center-back. Provoked the head-butt in 2006. Iron-willed enforcer.
Argentine goalkeeper. 2022 World Cup winner. Aston Villa number one. Infamous Golden Glove celebration.
Jamaican-born English winger. Liverpool forward of the 1980s. Rapped on World in Motion. Solo goal against Brazil in 1984.
Danish goalkeeper. Manchester United record-breaker. 1992 Euros winner. Son Kasper also keeps goal.
Turkish striker. Galatasaray legend. UEFA Cup winner in 2000. Scored 11 seconds into the 2002 World Cup third-place match.
Japanese midfielder. One of the first Japanese in Serie A. Roma Scudetto winner. Retired at 29.
Colombian midfielder. Huge blond afro. Three World Cups. Later played in MLS.
Croatian midfielder. AC Milan Serie A winner. Kicked a policeman at Dinamo Zagreb in 1990. 1998 World Cup third-place run.
Ghanaian midfielder. Chelsea midfielder. Mourinho called him The Bison. 2012 UCL winner.
Iranian striker. Held the men's international goals record before Ronaldo. Scored 109 for his country.
Chilean striker. Wore 1+8 at Inter. Real Madrid Pichichi. 1998 World Cup participant.
English striker. Towering 6'7" frame. Robot goal celebration. Liverpool and Spurs spells.
German libero. 1996 Ballon d'Or winner. Euro 96 champion. Later Borussia Dortmund sporting director.
French defender. 1998 World Cup and Euro 2000 winner. Juventus and Parma. Most capped French player for years.
French forward. 1958 Ballon d'Or winner. Stade de Reims and Real Madrid. Three straight European Cups.
French midfielder. Three consecutive 1980s Ballons d'Or. Euro 1984 top scorer. Later banned from FIFA.
Italian striker. Cagliari legend. Italy's all-time top scorer for decades. Scored 35 in 42 internationals.
German striker. 1980 and 1981 Ballon d'Or winner. Bayern Munich forward. Later Bayern CEO.
Italian goalkeeper. 1982 World Cup winner as captain at age 40. Juventus legend. Later national team coach.
Spanish forward. Nicknamed El Buitre. Leader of Real Madrid's Quinta del Buitre. Scored 4 vs Denmark in 1986.
German midfielder. Played for Barcelona, Real Madrid and Atletico. Euro 1980 winner. Creative playmaker.
English midfielder. Famous tears at Italia 90. Scored a volley against Scotland at Euro 96. Dentist's chair celebration.
Welsh striker. Liverpool's all-time top scorer. FA Cup final goals specialist. Trademark moustache.
Scottish forward. Liverpool player and manager. Nicknamed King. Celtic legend before Anfield.
Dutch attacking midfielder. AC Milan trio with Van Basten and Rijkaard. Dreadlocked captain. Euro 1988 winner.
Italian forward. Nicknamed Il Divin Codino for his ponytail. 1993 Ballon d'Or. Missed the decisive penalty in the 1994 final.
Italian winger. Nicknamed Magic Box. Parma and Chelsea legend. Italy's 1994 World Cup squad member.
Italian forward. Nicknamed the Swan of Utrecht? No, the Blond Assassin. Juventus and Inter goal machine.
German defender. Nicknamed Der Kaiser. Captained West Germany to the 1974 World Cup. Later coached them to the 1990 title.
English striker. Nicknamed Sniffer. Leeds forward of the 1970s. England international of the same era.
Portuguese winger. Manchester United, Chelsea and Roma. Nicknamed the Portuguese Magnifico. Euro 2004 runner-up.
Bulgarian midfielder. Napoli player of the late 1990s. Scored at the 1994 World Cup semi-final vs Italy.
Romanian forward. Nicknamed Kamikaze. Real Madrid and Chelsea. Scored five vs Cameroon at USA 94? No, scored at France 98.
Czech midfielder. Juventus and Lazio number 10. 2003 Ballon d'Or winner. Euro 96 runner-up.
Czech striker. Baresi's rival in Serie A. Lazio lone striker. Euro 96 top scorer alongside Shearer.
Russian striker. CSKA Moscow legend. Euro 2008 semi-finalist. Played for Arsenal briefly.
Nigerian striker. Three-time African Footballer of the Year. Barcelona and Inter legend. 1996 Olympic gold.
Nigerian midfielder. Spanish-raised playmaker. Played for Spain at youth level before choosing Nigeria.
South African forward. Leeds United and PSV. Scored a wonder goal vs Charlton in 2000. Nicknamed Shoes.
Moroccan striker. Coventry and Real Madrid. Scored at the 1998 World Cup for his country.
Ghanaian striker. Porto and Marseille. Nicknamed the Prince of Nima. Brother of Kevin-Prince.
Serbian striker. Lazio and Inter marksman. Euro 2000 participant. Sinisa Mihajlovic's contemporary.
Yugoslav-born playmaker. Red Star Belgrade legend. Lazio Serie A winner. Created Sinisa Mihajlovic's set-piece school.
Portuguese defender. Real Madrid center-back. Euro 2016 winner. Shaved head and red shirt at the Bernabeu.
Bosnian striker. Wolfsburg, Manchester City and Roma. Scored 28 times in his country's qualifying to World Cup 2014.
Armenian midfielder. Borussia Dortmund, Arsenal and Manchester United. Nicknamed Micki.
Icelandic midfielder. Cardiff and Everton. Scored the famous goal vs England at Euro 2016.
Peruvian striker. Bayern Munich forward. Nicknamed the Raging Bull. Copa America 2015 top scorer.
Cameroonian striker. Inter, Barcelona and Chelsea. African Player of the Year four times. Scored in two UCL finals.

200.q: I tell the time with hands that never touch. I have a face but no eyes. What am I?
I melt as I burn and light up the dark. I shrink with every flicker. What am I?
I reflect what stands before me, yet I have no eyes. I break into bad luck. What am I?
I must be broken before use. Without me, omelets could not exist. What am I?
I have a neck but no head. I am often filled with drink. What am I?
I have teeth yet cannot chew. You use me on your hair. What am I?
The more of me you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I come alive with wind. What am I?
I have four legs but never walk. I sit in the kitchen or dining room. What am I?
I grow wetter the more I dry you. What am I?
I follow you everywhere but disappear when it's dark. What am I?
I have a head and a tail but no body. I often live in pockets. What am I?
I am tall when new and short when old. You burn me for light. What am I?
I fall but never break. I break but never fall. What are we?
I have one eye but cannot see. I help sew clothes. What am I?
I have a bed but never sleep. I have a mouth but never speak. What am I?
I am full of holes yet I hold water. What am I?
I have four fingers and a thumb, but I am not alive. What am I?
I go up but never come down. Everyone has it. What am I?
I have cities but no houses. I have mountains but no trees. What am I?
I travel the world while staying in one corner. What am I?
I have a ring but no finger. I chime or buzz. What am I?
I have a head at night and lose it during the day. What am I?
I am black inside and white outside. I am full of holes yet I hold. What am I?
I have leaves but am not a plant. I have a spine but no bones. What am I?
I am a glass box that holds water and creatures with gills. You feed my inhabitants flakes. What am I?
I have two hands but no arms. I strike every hour. What am I?
I freeze in cold and melt in heat, yet I cannot move. What am I?
I have wheels but no engine. I race down hills on snow. What am I?
I am white and cold. I fall from the sky in flakes. What am I?
I come in pairs and live on feet. You lace me up. What am I?
I hold your tea and sit on a table. I have a handle and a lip. What am I?
I store all your clothes. I have drawers but no pens. What am I?
I ring, I buzz, or I sing. I wake you up in the morning. What am I?
I flutter in the breeze and tell the nation's story. What am I?
I have petals but no voice. I smell sweet to lovers. What am I?
I hop in the grass and was once a tadpole. What am I?
I am round and citrus-colored, named after my own hue. You squeeze me for juice. What am I?
I am long and yellow and monkeys love me. What am I?
I hold scissors, erasers, rulers and writing tools on a student's desk. What am I?
I shine at night but hide by day. I change shape every month. What am I?
I am the brightest in the sky and warm your skin. What am I?
I fall from the sky and water the garden. What am I?
I am a plastic or metal vessel you refill at the fountain. Runners carry me with a strap. What am I?
I have a point at one end and an eraser at the other. What am I?
I beep in the kitchen when food is ready. What am I?
I connect two floors and I can be made of wood or stone. What am I?
I grow taller by the year but I do not breathe. I have bark but cannot bite. What am I?
I have a lid but no mouth. I open to reveal a meal. What am I?
I spin and cool a room without giving a breeze from nature. What am I?

400.q: I am lighter than a feather, yet the strongest person cannot hold me for long. What am I?
I can hide a city, though I am made of tiny drops. The more of me there is, the less you see. What am I?
You can catch me but you cannot throw me. I come with sneezing. What am I?
I can be cracked, told, or played. People laugh when they hear me. What am I?
What 5-letter word becomes smaller in meaning when you append the letters E and R?
I belong to you, but other people use it more than you do. What am I?
I have many keys but open no locks. I make music. What am I?
Two people can have me without ever touching me. We chatter back and forth. What am I?
I am the beginning of everything and the end of everywhere. What am I?
Feed me and I live. Give me water and I die. What am I?
I have no voice but teach you much. I have spines and hinges but am not a plant or a door. What am I?
I begin with the letter E and end with the letter E, yet I contain just one letter. What am I?
I come once in a minute, twice in a moment, but never in a thousand years. What am I?
I am an invention that lets you look straight through a wall. What am I?
You can see me in water, but I never get wet. What am I?
I am a word of 5 letters. People eat me. Remove my first letter and I become a form of energy. What am I?
People buy me to eat off, but never eat me. What am I?
If you have me, you want to share me. If you share me, you don't have me. What am I?
What kind of tree can you carry in your hand?
What area of the house do ghosts avoid, according to the old joke?
I am not a plant but I have leaves. I am not royalty but I have a crown. I am sweet but sugar was never added. What am I?
You can hear me but never see me. I come out when you speak. What am I?
I can run but have no legs. I sit between the eyes. What am I?
What invention allows you to walk through walls?
I keep ships from drifting. I sink but never drown. What am I?
I have an eye but cannot see. I can tear roofs from homes. What am I?
I have a spine but no legs. I sit on shelves for years. What am I?
I have a neck but no shoulders. I have a cap but no hair. What am I?
What has four wheels and flies?
I am kept for life but cannot be held. I fade as one ages. What am I?
I'm black when you get me, red when you use me, and grey when you throw me away. What am I?
I can be quick or dead, yet never breathed. What am I?
I circle a finger as a symbol of lifelong love. I am often made of gold. What am I?
What comes down but never goes up?
I have a thousand needles but cannot sew. I grow in the mountains. What am I?
I travel from room to room without moving. I follow the pipes. What am I?
I am the only word that ends in MT. What am I?
I have a face with numbers, but no head with brains. I tick-tock. What am I?
I cover the bed but am neither sheet nor blanket. I am decorative. What am I?
You use me when you go from one floor to another, but I have no stairs. What am I?
I have a tongue that cannot taste and a sole that has no soul. What am I?
I get wet while drying, and I hang in the bathroom. What am I?
I am a ship that sails underwater without getting wet inside. What am I?
I flash and crack across the sky, louder than a drum. What am I?
I bend light across the sky after rain. I have seven colors. What am I?
I live underground and rise only to bloom. I am wrapped in papery skin. What am I?
I have many rings but I am not for fingers. I float in soda. What am I?
What gets bigger the more you take away from it?
I can be split or shared, yet never divided in half cleanly. I keep families bonded. What am I?
I lie at your feet and greet every arrival. What am I?

600.q: Three lives have I. Gentle enough to soothe the skin, light enough to caress the sky, hard enough to crack rocks. What am I?
Two bodies have I, though both joined in one. The more still I stand, the quicker I run. What am I?
At night they come without being fetched, and by day they are lost without being stolen. What are they?
The man who makes me does not want me. The man who buys me does not use me. The man who uses me does not know it. What am I?
Always old, sometimes new. Never sad, sometimes blue. Never empty, sometimes full. What am I?
I make you weak at the worst of times. I make your heart pound and hands sweat. I visit the weak but seldom the bold. What am I?
A cloud is my mother, the wind my father. A rainbow is my bed, the earth my final resting place. What am I?
I am the black child of a white father, a wingless bird flying even to the clouds of heaven. What am I?
He marries many women but has never been married himself. Who is he?
Alive without breath, as cold as death. Never thirsty, ever drinking. All in mail, never clinking. What am I?
I start with T, end with T, and have T in me. What am I?
What word in the dictionary is spelled the wrong way?
Voiceless it cries, wingless flutters, toothless bites, mouthless mutters. What is it?
I turn once — that which is outside will not get in. I turn again — that which is inside will not get out. What am I?
The sun bakes them, the hand breaks them, the foot treads on them, and the mouth tastes them. What are they?
I am the fountain from which no one can drink. Like gold to all I am sought. What am I?
What can fill a room but takes up no space?
I have no life, but I can die. You plug me in to charge. What am I?
Poor people have it. Rich people need it. If you eat it, you die. What is it?
The more you take away from me, the bigger I grow. What am I?
What are the next two letters in the series: O, T, T, F, F, S, S, _, _?
A man rode into town on the sixth day of the week, stayed three days, and departed on the same day of the week. How?
A mother had three children. The first was named April, the second May. What was the third child's name?
What is black when clean and white when dirty?
I get smaller every time I take a bath. What am I?
I am always coming but never arrive. What am I?
I am so fragile that saying my name breaks me. What am I?
Until I am measured, I am not known, yet you miss me when I have flown. What am I?
I am always in front of you but can never be seen. What am I?
I begin and have no end. I am also the ending of all that begins. What am I?
I am not alive, but I grow. I don't have lungs, but I need air. I don't have a mouth, but water kills me. What am I?
I fly without wings. I cry without eyes. Wherever I go, darkness flies. What am I?
I have mountains, valleys, rivers and deserts but no soil, water or grass. What am I?
I have cities but no people. I have forests but no trees. I have rivers without water. What am I?
If you drop me I'm sure to crack, but give me a smile and I'll always smile back. What am I?
I have a shining head and a matching tail but a hollow middle. I am minted by kings. What am I?
What word looks the same upside down and backward?
I can be long, I can be short. I can be grown, and I can be bought. I can be painted, or left bare. I can be round or square. What am I?
I have no eyes, ears, or spine, but I tell a gripping story. I have many pages. What am I?
I run over fields and woods all day. Under the bed at night I sit not alone. My tongue hangs out, up and to the rear, awaiting to be filled in the morning. What am I?
I am taken from a mine and shut up in a wooden case, from which I am never released. Yet I am used by almost every person. What am I?
I am everywhere, but you can't see me. I fill lungs and lift kites. What am I?
I come in many shapes and colors. Snap me in half and I might shatter your teeth. What am I?
Every dawn begins with me. At dusk I'll be the first you see. Without me, planets would collapse. What am I?
I have a heart that never beats. I have a home but never sleep. I can take a man's house and build another's. And I love to play games with my many brothers. What am I?
I am an insect and half my name is another insect. I am similar to a creature which is called after a letter. What am I?
Forward I am heavy, backward I am not. What am I?
I have lakes with no water, mountains with no stone, and cities with no buildings. What am I?

I can sizzle like bacon, I am made with an egg, I have plenty of backbone but lack a good leg. I peel layers like onions but still remain whole. I can be long like a flagpole, yet fit in a hole. What am I?
I weaken all men for hours each day. I show you strange visions while you are away. I take you by night, by day take you back. None suffer to have me, but do from my lack. What am I?

200.q: I led India to independence through nonviolent resistance.
I was a Roman dictator stabbed on the Ides of March.
I painted the Mona Lisa in Renaissance Italy.
I formulated the theory of relativity and the equation E=mc^2.
I was the first U.S. President and led the Continental Army.
I led the Allies in WWII as British Prime Minister.
I was a French general who became Emperor and lost at Waterloo.
I gave the 'I Have a Dream' speech in 1963.
I was Queen of England during the defeat of the Spanish Armada in 1588.
I was the long-reigning British monarch of the 19th century who gave my name to an era.
I sailed across the Atlantic in 1492 looking for a western route to Asia.
I was the 16th U.S. President and ended slavery.
I was an inventor known for the light bulb and phonograph.
I was a Greek philosopher and student of Plato.
I was an Italian astronomer who supported heliocentrism.
I was a co-founder of Apple alongside Woz, famous for the black turtleneck.
I founded Microsoft with Paul Allen.
I was the third U.S. President and author of the Declaration of Independence.
I was a Spanish painter known for melting clocks.
I was a Mexican painter known for self-portraits and a unibrow.
I was an English playwright who wrote Romeo and Juliet.
I was a Greek philosopher who drank hemlock.
I was a Dutch painter who cut off part of my ear.
I was the founder of modern psychoanalysis in Vienna.
I was a Jewish girl who wrote a famous diary while hiding from Nazis.
I was a deaf and blind American author and activist.
I was the first woman to fly solo across the Atlantic.
I refused to give up my seat on a bus and sparked a civil rights movement.
I was a famous Egyptian queen who allied with Caesar and Mark Antony.
I was the founder of the Mongol Empire in the 13th century.
I was a Russian monk adviser to the Romanov family before the revolution.
I was the founder of Facebook at Harvard.
I was a Tibetan spiritual leader awarded the 1989 Nobel Peace Prize.
I was the South African leader who became president after years in prison.
I was a Polish-French scientist who won Nobel Prizes in physics and chemistry.
I was an American aviator and the first man to walk on the Moon.
I was the Macedonian king who built an empire stretching to India.
I was an American scientist and Founding Father who flew kites in storms.
I was the American pop artist who painted Campbell's soup cans.
I was the first U.S. astronaut to orbit the Earth.
I was an American Baptist reverend and Nobel Peace laureate gunned down on a Tennessee balcony in 1968.
I was a Biblical ruler famous for wisdom, a golden temple in Jerusalem, and being David's son.
I was an Italian explorer who reached Asia and served Kublai Khan.
I was a French woman who led armies at age 17 during the Hundred Years' War.
I formulated the three laws of motion under a falling apple tree.
I was a blonde American actress and icon who sang 'Happy Birthday, Mr. President.'
I was the youngest-ever U.S. President, assassinated in Dallas in 1963.
I was a German dictator who led the Nazi Party and started WWII.
I was a Soviet leader who came to power after Lenin and ruled for decades.
I was a Spanish conquistador who defeated the Inca Empire.

400.q: I was a Polish-French scientist who won two Nobel Prizes for radioactivity work.
I was the last Tsar of Russia, executed with my family in 1918.
I was a Chinese philosopher whose teachings shape East Asian ethics.
I was a German monk whose 95 Theses sparked the Reformation.
I was the British nurse who founded modern nursing during the Crimean War.
I was a French scientist who proved the germ theory of disease.
I was a Roman emperor and Stoic philosopher who wrote 'Meditations.'
I was the Chinese revolutionary who founded the People's Republic in 1949.
I was the founder of Buddhism in ancient India.
I was the Soviet leader who introduced glasnost and perestroika.
I was an English naturalist who proposed evolution by natural selection.
I was the first female British Prime Minister.
I was an African American civil rights activist and Muslim minister assassinated in Harlem.
I was an Argentine revolutionary who fought alongside Fidel Castro.
I was an American boxer known as 'The Greatest.'
I was a Pakistani activist who survived being shot by the Taliban and won the Nobel Peace Prize.
I was the Mughal emperor who built the Taj Mahal for my wife.
I was an English physicist whose work on cosmology was renowned despite ALS.
I was the Indian leader and first Prime Minister after independence.
I was a Russian chemist who created the periodic table.
I was the Cuban revolutionary who led the 1959 revolution.
I was the Soviet premier who presided over the Cuban Missile Crisis.
I was an American inventor who patented the telephone.
I was the Ottoman Sultan who conquered Constantinople in 1453.
I was a Spanish conquistador who toppled the Aztec Empire.
I was the Prussian military theorist who wrote 'On War.'
I was an American scientist who coordinated the Manhattan Project.
I was a Spanish painter known for Guernica and cubism.
I was the founder of Standard Oil, once America's richest man.
I was the American industrialist who built a steel empire and funded libraries.
I was the American industrialist whose Model T transformed manufacturing.
I was a Russian playwright and short story author of 'The Cherry Orchard.'
I was an American jazz trumpeter known as Satchmo.
I was the U.S. President during Vietnam who escalated bombing and declined re-election.
I was the U.S. President who launched the New Deal during the Great Depression.
I was an English conservationist who studied chimpanzees in Tanzania.
I was a British codebreaker at Bletchley Park during WWII.
I was a Romanian-American mathematician, father of game theory.
I was the Spanish navigator whose expedition first circumnavigated the globe.
I was an English explorer who died seeking the source of the Nile.
I was the U.S. abolitionist who escaped slavery and led others to freedom via the Underground Railroad.
I was the American writer of 'Huckleberry Finn' and 'Tom Sawyer.'
I was an Irish playwright known for sharp wit and 'The Importance of Being Earnest.'
I was a French general who led the Free French during WWII and later became President.
I was the founder of modern Turkey after the fall of the Ottoman Empire.
I was a Palestinian leader and PLO chairman for decades.
I was an Israeli Prime Minister assassinated in 1995 after signing peace accords.
I was a Norwegian explorer, first to reach the South Pole.
I was an Austrian composer who wrote 'The Four Seasons' (no wait) — actually a teenage prodigy in Salzburg.
I was an Italian Baroque composer of 'The Four Seasons' violin concertos.

600.q: I was a Carthaginian general who crossed the Alps with elephants against Rome.
I was the Persian king who invaded Greece and was repelled at Salamis.
I was a Florentine political philosopher who wrote 'The Prince.'
I was a Polish astronomer who placed the Sun at the center of the universe.
I was a Soviet cosmonaut, the first human in space in 1961.
I was a Roman general turned first emperor, founder of the Empire.
I was an Italian explorer whose first name graces the American continents.
I was a Russian author of 'War and Peace.'
I was a Serbian-American inventor and pioneer of alternating current.
I was an English mathematician whose program broke Nazi codes.
I was a Russian author of 'Crime and Punishment.'
I was a French author of 'Les Miserables.'
I was a Russian revolutionary who led the Bolsheviks to power in 1917.
I was an English author of 'A Christmas Carol' and 'Oliver Twist.'
I was a German composer who wrote nine symphonies despite being deaf.
I was the Macedonian-born Catholic nun who served the poor in Calcutta.
I was the Ottoman Sultan who besieged Vienna in 1529.
I was a German-born Russian empress whose 18th-century reign is remembered as a golden age.
I was the Prussian king who militarized and modernized the state.
I was an English mathematician and the world's first computer programmer.
I was the Mongol emperor of Yuan China who hosted Marco Polo.
I was the Aztec emperor defeated by Cortes.
I was a French peasant girl who led armies at 17 and was burned at the stake.
I was an Egyptian pharaoh famous for a gold burial mask found in 1922.
I was a female pharaoh of Egypt who wore a false beard.
I was the Byzantine empress who rose from an actress to co-ruler in the 6th century.
I was the Byzantine emperor who codified Roman law in the 6th century.
I was the reluctant English monarch who sealed the Magna Carta at Runnymede in 1215.
I was the English king with six wives who broke from Rome.
I was a 13th-century Persian Sufi mystic whose poetry inspired the whirling dervishes.
I was a French mathematician and philosopher who wrote 'I think, therefore I am.'
I was a German philosopher known for 'Thus Spoke Zarathustra.'
I was the German philosopher who wrote 'Critique of Pure Reason.'
I was a Dutch painter of the Golden Age, known for 'The Night Watch.'
I was a Dutch painter who depicted a young woman with a pearl earring.
I was a French Impressionist best known for water lilies.
I was an American abolitionist and women's rights leader born into slavery.
I was a French Existentialist writer of 'Being and Nothingness.'
I was the German-born astronomer who described the laws of planetary motion.
I was a Danish astronomer with a famous silver and gold nose.
I was the Chinese admiral who led treasure fleets to Africa in the 15th century.
I was the Scottish economist who wrote 'The Wealth of Nations.'
I was an English economist who championed government spending during slumps.
I was a southern African warrior-king who unified scattered tribes in the early 19th century and revolutionized the assegai.
I was the Haitian general who led the only successful slave revolt founding a nation.
I was a Venezuelan general who liberated much of South America from Spain.
I was an Argentine general who helped liberate Chile and Peru alongside Bolivar.
I was an English explorer who first circumnavigated Australia.
I was the Russian composer of 'The Rite of Spring.'
I was a Czech-Austrian composer of the 'New World Symphony.'

200.q: I am the king of the jungle and live in prides.
I am the largest land animal on Earth, famous for my long trunk.
I have black and white stripes and roam African savannas.
I am the tallest animal on Earth and eat leaves from treetops.
I am the largest mammal in the ocean.
I jump using powerful hind legs and carry my young in a pouch.
I have a black-and-white face and eat bamboo in China.
I am the fastest land animal over short distances.
I am a large flightless African bird, the heaviest of all birds.
I live in the Arctic and have thick white fur.
I am known as 'man's best friend.'
I purr and chase mice around the house.
I am pink and love mud baths on a farm.
I lay eggs and cluck on a farm.
I have a hard shell and walk very slowly on land.
I am a large bird of prey, the national symbol of the United States.
I am a black-and-white aquatic mammal also called the killer whale.
I am a small furry marsupial from Australia who eats eucalyptus.
I am known for my long ears and love carrots.
I howl at the moon and travel in packs.
I produce milk on farms and say 'moo.'
I am a woolly farm animal and am often counted to fall asleep.
I am a nocturnal bird famous for saying 'hoo.'
I am a graceful white waterbird symbolizing love.
I am a flightless bird that lives on icy southern continents.
I am a huge predator of the sea with many rows of teeth.
I am a fast-running bird with colorful feathers and a dangling comb.
I have eight legs and spin webs to catch prey.
I am a small reptile that climbs walls and has sticky feet.
I live in water and breathe through gills, sometimes golden in a bowl.
I have a long trunk — no wait, I hop with strong legs. I was once a tadpole.
I am a small brown nut-eater that scampers up trees.
I am a galloping farm animal that people ride.
I cluck and peck the ground — oh wait, I am the young one. I am yellow and fluffy.
I croak at night near the water's edge and snatch flies with my sticky tongue.
I live underwater, have scales, and glide with fins.
I am tiny, buzz around flowers, and produce honey.
I have a thick mane — no, I am the female who does the hunting in the pride.
I live on farms, am very large, and am used to pull plows in some countries.
I am small, fuzzy, and spin silk cocoons.
I fly at night, hang upside down, and use echolocation.
I am a bird that cannot fly, waddles, and swims gracefully.
I am a river reptile with armored skin and a long snout — common in American swamps.
I am a long snake-like fish of the Amazon that can generate a powerful shock.
I am famous for spraying a terrible smell when threatened.
I have four legs and antlers and am common in forests.
I have a white and brown coat and leap through fields with antlers branching.
I am gray, live in sewers, and carry plague in historical tales.
I am tiny and gray, squeak, and run from cats.
I waddle, lay eggs, and live near ponds. Quack.

400.q: I am the largest member of the cat family, orange with black stripes.
I am a great ape with shaggy orange fur from Borneo and Sumatra.
I am the largest living reptile, prowling Australian and Asian estuaries and known to take on sharks.
I am a large flightless Australian bird, second tallest after the ostrich.
I am a North American mammal known for building dams and lodges.
I am a primate and humans' closest living relative.
I am the only mammal capable of true flight.
I am a marine mammal known for echolocation and playful intelligence.
I am a huge brown mammal with a prominent shoulder hump, native to the Rockies and Alaska.
I am a small desert fox with huge ears, living in the Sahara.
I am a flightless bird and the national symbol of New Zealand.
I am a massive South American snake, the heaviest in the world.
I am a huge African mammal with two horns and thick gray skin.
I am a large ape from central Africa, bigger than a chimpanzee.
I am known for my striking pink color from eating shrimp.
I am a reptile of tropical seas with a hard shell and flippers.
I am a marine mammal with two long tusks living in Arctic waters.
I am the second-largest cat in the Americas after the jaguar.
I am a horned African antelope famous for huge spiral horns.
I am a striped scavenger of Africa that 'laughs.'
I have eight arms and can squirt ink to escape predators.
I am a slow-moving mammal that lives upside down in rainforest trees.
I am the world's largest fish, a spotted gentle giant.
I am a venomous snake with a hood, iconic in India.
I am a small Australian dog-like predator with a powerful bite.
I am a tropical bird known for vivid plumage and mimicking speech.
I am a giant lizard from Indonesia, the largest living lizard.
I scuttle sideways on beaches and pinch with my claws.
I am a tiny ocean creature with a curled upright body.
I am a clawed ocean crustacean often steamed red for dinner.
I am a large African grazing mammal often wallowing in rivers with huge jaws.
I am a striped African relative of the giraffe with zebra-like legs.
I am the largest rodent in North America and native to cold regions.
I am a North African big cat with a powerful bite, once nearly extinct.
I am a large spotted African cat famous for climbing trees with my prey.
I am a South American big cat with a powerful bite, spotted like a leopard.
I am a long-legged desert bird sometimes used as transportation in the Sahara.
I am a South American camelid smaller than a llama, prized for soft wool.
I am a South American camelid used as a pack animal, taller than the alpaca.
I am a Chinese high-altitude primate with a flat face and bright amber fur, living in mountain forests.
I am a black-and-white mammal of North American forests famous for spraying a foul scent.
I am a small, insect-eating mammal with a pointy snout, often mistaken for a rodent.
I am a small white canid of the far north famous for seasonal coat changes.
I am a large antelope of Africa with a white-striped rear.
I am a brown aquatic mammal that uses tools to break shellfish, found on the Pacific coast.
I am a small Eurasian mustelid with a long body that hunts rabbits.
I am a venomous fish that looks like a rock on the seafloor.
I am a mountain goat with curled horns, native to the Alps.
I am a deer-like North American ungulate with forked horns, the second-fastest land mammal.
I am a fast-running bird of American deserts, known for my 'meep-meep.'

600.q: I am the only egg-laying mammal with a duck-like bill and webbed feet.
I am a small Australian marsupial often called the 'happiest animal on Earth.'
I am the largest rodent in the world, native to South America.
I am an Andean camelid prized for my soft wool, smaller than a guanaco.
I am the largest species of flightless Antarctic seabird, the ones that huddle against blizzards.
I am a deep-sea cephalopod with the largest eyes of any known animal.
I am a flightless bird of South America, similar to an ostrich.
I am an arboreal Australian marsupial known for gliding between trees.
I am a hoofed mammal of the Arctic with broad antlers and famously pull sleighs.
I am the world's largest amphibian, found in the rivers of East Asia and prized in cuisine.
I am a small carnivore from Madagascar, the island's largest predator.
I am the only venomous lizard species native to the United States.
I am a small primate from Madagascar with a long striped tail.
I am a marine mammal often called the 'sea cow.'
I am a small spiny mammal of Europe that curls into a ball for defense.
I am an arctic whale famous for a long single spiraled tusk.
I am a small African mammal famous for standing upright on guard.
I am a deep-sea fish known for a bioluminescent lure on my head.
I am a large flightless bird from Australia and New Guinea, with shaggy black feathers and a bony casque.
I am a fish that can survive on land for short periods using my fins to skip.
I am the largest arthropod in the world by leg span, found off Honshu.
I am a small carnivorous mammal of South America with a banded tail and long snout.
I am a wild ox of Southeast Asia and the world's largest bovine.
I am a tiny Antarctic crustacean that forms the base of the ocean food chain.
I am a scaly anteater, the most trafficked mammal in the world.
I am a Mexican salamander that stays in its larval stage for life and can regenerate limbs.
I am a nocturnal Madagascan primate with huge eyes and a long bony finger for extracting insects.
I am a wild pig-like mammal of Central and South America with a short snout like a tapir.
I am a herbivorous mammal with a flexible trunk-like snout, living in rainforests and savannas.
I am a small, fluffy cat from the steppes of Central Asia with a flat face.
I am a wild goat with a shaggy coat, hooked horns, and a regal beard, living in the Alps.
I am an elusive spotted big cat of the Himalayas, with a long furry tail for balance.
I am a small African deer-like animal with tiny spiked horns, about the size of a rabbit.
I am a painted canid of the savanna with mottled fur and huge round ears, hunting in coordinated packs.
I am a nocturnal Southeast Asian primate with huge round eyes, deliberate crawling movement, and a toxic bite.
I am a big-eyed primate of the Philippines known for being one of the smallest primates.
I am a Southeast Asian flying mammal that glides between trees using a membrane.
I am a spiny Australian mammal that lays eggs and eats ants and termites.
I am a large aquatic rodent of South America that resembles a beaver without the flat tail.
I am a hoofed mammal of Central Asia with a bulbous nose, critically endangered.
I am a large North American member of the deer family, the biggest of all deer.
I am a huge shaggy mammal of the Great Plains, hunted to near extinction in the 1800s.
I am a small spotted wild cat of the American Southwest with tufted ears.
I am a nocturnal South American creature with a prehensile tail that hangs upside down — the only American marsupial.
I am a small flightless parrot of New Zealand, the world's heaviest parrot.
I am the world's largest living reptile shell-bearer, native to a volcanic archipelago Darwin studied.
I am a nocturnal Australian marsupial that digs burrows and has a backward-facing pouch.
I am a large striped wild ass of East Africa with very narrow stripes.
I am a long-limbed African cat with tufted ears, known for leaping high to catch birds.
I am a thick-furred stocky mustelid of northern forests, the largest member of my weasel family and fearlessly aggressive.
